findings.problem: Narration repeatedly falls into elliptical clipping and noun-fragment emphasis ("Cheap line.", "Not pulped. Not destroyed. Stored.", "Bleach. fat. hot ink.", "Not failure. Not sloppiness. Design."). The constitution explicitly forbids subject-dropping/article-stripping as a rhythm crutch, and the repetition makes the prose feel mannered rather than earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:91, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:243, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:431, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:469, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507, rewrite clipped narration into grammatically complete sentences or fully anchored clauses. Keep labels/signage as fragments where the text is literally on a screen or wall, but do not let Mira's narration rely on orphaned nouns/participles for force.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:91, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:243, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:431, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:469, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507 reads as complete syntax when read aloud, except for literal on-screen or posted text. FAIL if the passage still depends on clipped beats like "Cheap line." or "Not pulped. Not destroyed. Stored." in narration.

findings.problem: Once the warehouse logic is legible, the chapter keeps repackaging the same thesis in successive interpretive paragraphs: debtor scans as base, premium residue as enrichment, deliberate design instead of accident. Because the scene explains the discovery several times after it has already landed, the back quarter loses some forward pressure and starts to feel argued rather than unfolding.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:463, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:477, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:495, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507, compress or redistribute the interpretive summary so each revelation beat does one distinct job: the floor scene proves bonus-driven sorting, the terminal proves formal authorization, and the canal aftermath clarifies what evidence is still missing plus what Lin/Mira now have to do with it.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after revision, the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:463, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:477, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:495, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507 each add a new fact, stake, or emotional consequence that was not already explicit in the previous beat. FAIL if two adjacent interpretive paragraphs still restate that the system was deliberate without adding new information.

findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same `as if` comparison bridge so often that it becomes a visible template rather than a flexible sentence tool. After enough repetitions, the prose starts sounding mechanically assembled from one favored move instead of responding freshly to each beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:67, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:349, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:411, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:481, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507, replace most of the `as if` constructions with direct sensory statement, varied syntax, or one-off comparisons that are specific to that moment. Preserve only the strongest one or two.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:67, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:349, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:411, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:481, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507 contain no more than two surviving `as if` comparisons total, and each surviving comparison introduces a distinct image rather than a generic comparison bridge. FAIL if the chapter still repeatedly leans on `as if` to do ordinary descriptive work.

summary: Booker and dialogue pass: Warehouse Nine is both materially disgusting and administratively banal, Lin keeps the discovery chapter personal, the state shift lands, and the character voices stay distinct and contraction-appropriate with no continuity contradictions against the supplied canon. Craft and prose fail because the chapter overpackages its core revelation in the back quarter and relies too heavily on clipped-fragment narration plus repeated `as if` scaffolding, which makes the sentence texture feel formulaic.
